task: Find the most popular blue Lilo & Stitch toys.
final_result_response:
Based on my thorough review of all 21 Lilo & Stitch toys on the Disney Store (disneystore.com), sorted by **"Most Popular"**, here are the **most popular blue Lilo & Stitch toys** in order of popularity:

1. **Stitch Plush Easter Bunny – Lilo & Stitch – 13"** – $29.99 (blue Stitch in bunny costume, 1 review)
2. **Stitch Urupocha-Chan Plush – Lilo & Stitch – Mini 4"** – $16.99, ★★★★½ (9 reviews)
3. **Stitch Plush – Lilo & Stitch – Large 21 1/4"** – $44.99, ★★★★ (26 reviews)
4. **Stitch Plush in Swaddle – Lilo & Stitch – Disney Babies – Small** – $39.99, ★★★★★ (6 reviews)
5. **Stitch Cuddleez Plush – Lilo & Stitch – Large 23"** – $44.99, ★★★½ (12 reviews)
6. **Stitch Plush – Lilo & Stitch – Medium 15 3/4"** – $29.99, ★★★★½ (85 reviews)
7. **Stitch Puppetronic by RealFX – Lilo & Stitch Live Action Film** – $99.99, ★★ (1 review)
8. **Lilo & Stitch Figure Set** – $39.99 (includes blue Stitch figure)

The **#1 most popular blue toy** is the **Stitch Plush Easter Bunny** (currently trending for the season), while the **highest-rated with most reviews** is the **Stitch Plush – Medium 15 3/4"** with 85 reviews and a 4.5-star rating at $29.99.
